name: Numbero Uno Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the cookies with milk, spreading about 2 cups of whipped topping on each.
2. Refrigerate any remaining whipped topping.
3. Stack the cookies in groups of 4 or 5.
4. Lay the stacks end to end on a serving tray to form a "1". Lightly press the stacks together so they adhere to one another.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 6 hours, or freeze for 4 hours until firm.
6. Just before serving, remove the plastic wrap.
7. Frost the cake with any remaining whipped topping.
8. Garnish with sprinkles and decorating gel.
